---
title: "CV"
toc: false
engine: knitr
include-in-header:
  text: |
    <link rel="stylesheet" href="https://cdnjs.cloudflare.com/ajax/libs/font-awesome/6.5.0/css/all.min.css">
---

My CV covers my academic background in linguistics, my work in research
data science at UW–Madison, and the tools and projects I've built along
the way. Last updated `r format(Sys.Date(), '%B %Y')`.

<div style="text-align: center; margin-top: 2rem;">
  <a href="erwinlares-cv.pdf" download class="btn btn-outline-secondary">
    <i class="fa-solid fa-file-pdf"></i> Download a copy of Erwin Lares' CV
  </a>
</div>
